results.question: in how many games did the winning team score more than 4 points?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl WHERE CAST(SUBSTRING(score, 1, INSTR(score, '–') - 1) AS INTEGER) > 4 OR CAST(SUBSTRING(score, INSTR(score, '–') + 1) AS INTEGER) > 4

results.question: which model has the most in service?
results.prediction: Based on the provided tables and the computed result, the model with the most units in service is the KM-45 Series (with 727 units listed in the "In Service" column).

results.question: in 1996 the sc house of representatives had a republican majority. how many years had passed since the last time this happened?
results.prediction: Based on the provided document and the computed SQL result, 122 years had passed since the last time the Republican Party held a majority in the SC House of Representatives prior to 1996.
results.sql: SELECT 1996 - MAX(CAST(year AS BIGINT)) FROM tbl_11 WHERE republican_nparty > democratic_nparty AND CAST(year AS BIGINT) < 1996

results.question: how many beta versions were released before the first full release?

Based on the provided document, there were 8 beta versions released before the first full release (version 1.0).

The beta versions listed are:
1. Version 0.1 (9 June 1993)
2. Version 0.2 (14 June 1993)
3. Version 0.3 (16 June 1993)
4. Version 0.4 (18 June 1993)
5. Version 0.5 (24 June 1993)
6. Version 0.6 (30 June 1993)
7. Version 0.8 (5 November 1993)
8. Version 0.9 (16 November 1993)
